---
title: "Chapter 11 Notes"
author: "Owen Webb"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Installing required packages

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(dslabs)
```

```{r}
mtcars %>% head()
```

```{r}
just3 <- select(mtcars, mpg, cyl, hp)
```

```{r}
powerfulauto <- mtcars %>% 
  filter(am == 0, hp > 150) %>% 
  select(hp, mpg)

View(powerfulauto)
```
